response: The liver plays a crucial role in supporting the [muscle] system by [producing] essential [proteins] needed for [energy] and [recovery]. It helps in [metabolizing] nutrients that [uncle] consumes during [exercise]. The [uncle] of the [uncle] is also involved in [detoxifying] harmful substances that might affect [muscle] performance. The [uncle] also helps in [storing] glycogen, which is vital for [uncle] during physical activity.
